title: Sony Extra Bass Bluetooth Headphones, Best Wireless Sports Earbuds with Mic/Microphone, IPX4 Splashproof Stereo Comfort Gym Running Workout up to 8.5 Hour Battery, Black (International Version)
description: MDR-XB50BS/B Wireless Sports Bluetooth In-ear Headphones Rain or shine, these wireless sports headphones are more than an accessory for your active lifestyle and smartphone. They keep you connected to phone calls, favorite music and even your workout playlist. Lightweight design and comfortable fit make sure these headphones keep up the pace on your daily commute or routine at the gym.
features: Connect wirelessly - Bluetooth connectivity lets you listen for up to 8. 5 hours without wires getting in your way.
Be ready for splashes - Durable IPX4 design keeps the music going, even when you run in light rain.

Hear the beat, feel the power - EXTRA BASS sound gives you more motivation, whether you’re at the gym or on the street. Enhanced low frequencies make music sound more powerful, so you feel energized and driven.

Listen anywhere, do anything - Never be without your music again. Bluetooth connectivity lets you run, jump, kick and more, without wires holding you back. Ergonomic arc supporters keep the headphones securely in position while you exercise.

A built-in microphone for hands-free calls - You don’t have to pause your workout to take that important phone call. With a built-in microphone and Bluetooth connectivity, you can make and answer calls wirelessly from your smartphone.
Connectivity Technology: Bluetooth, NFC
Included Components: Information not available

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

reviews.title: Even more in love with Elago products now
reviews.text:
OMG! The finish on this case is so soft I can't stop touching it! ... Good touch, not bad touch.
I've been super impressed with everything I've bought from Elago since I discovered them and they are my go-to brand for phone cases. I saw this Airpod case listed for a very reasonable price and being Elago I didn't really think twice when selecting it. I was not disappointed!
Great fit and manufacture. And the finish on the silicone is easily the softest and most even I've even seen/felt. It's so soft. I find myself mindlessly picking it up while sitting at my computer and running my fingers over the surface turning it in my hand because it feels so nice. Elago knocked it out of the park again.

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

Volume, sound and use of buttons are all fantastic.

reviews.title: They constantly fail

The sound is good but they constantly fail to connect with my windows 10 laptop. When they do connect, it is usually just one of the earbuds and then it disconnects a short time later. I guess the battery life is okay but I've never been able to run them down as I get so frustrated with the connectivity issues.
The final straw was when I took them out for a jog for the fist time. One earbud failed and now will not power on. Is it due to moisture? I'll never know & I don't care. These are going in the trash.

reviews.title: Turns off when I use the Aux
reviews.text: These don’t connect to a number of my Bluetooth devices. Basically only phones and tablets work with them. So I tried to use the AUX cord, and as soon as you turn it on with the aux cord in or plug it in when they’re already on, they shut off. Even in the directions it says they shut off….then why add it??? Even after they shut off, I tried to see if they worked anyway since the directions say that. They don’t. If they only connect to phones & tablets through Bluetooth only, it needs to say that.

reviews.title: These saved my ears! Literally.
reviews.text: My new Bose 700 headphones kept causing an allergic reaction to my ears and the skin all the way around my ears.  Like blisters, redness, swelling and SEVERE itching.  The first time, I wore them for an afternoon and it took 3 weeks for the allergy to be cleared up.  I then washed the cups of the headphones with a soapy wash rag and rinsed well.  The second time I wore them for just under 2 hours and again had a reaction that took 2 weeks to clear up.  I use another brand of headphones daily to watch TV (that I also purchased from amazon) and have never had a reaction before.  I found these covers and they have completely fixed the reaction issue.  I also ordered another brand of ear cup covers off amazon to try but prefer these.  I'll be ordering another so I'll have extras just in case 😉.

reviews.title: Does what i expect it to do
reviews.text:
I expect it to keep the sweat off the ear pads, and it does this.

But since it wraps over the ear cups, it does not allow the ear cups to rest nicely around your ears.
This means that it affects the headset's noise cancellation a bit.

Also, if you wear it for a prolonged amount of time, it hurts the ears and is less comfortable. I wear glasses and this exacerbates the tension behind my ears.
This is particularly for me with my glasses.

reviews.title: Reasonably comfy, but poor fabric quality and small sound hole.
reviews.text:
06/22/22. Revised rating down to 1-star. The fabric is awful, pills badly and attracts every bit of dust and hair. I stopped using these on Zoom calls because they look disgusting. See photo. This is what yours will look like after a few months.

----------------------

Fits my Yamaha MT5 headphones fine. It may make zero difference in sound, but I feel like the center hole is about half the size it should be. Not sure what they were thinking. I'd like to see to somebody make something similar, with thicker, more breathable fabric, and 1-inch hole.

reviews.title: Very big, but useful.
reviews.text: Very large, I was hoping for a snug fit. These extended further than the actual cushion.  So if you want to charge you will need to take off or just pull off a little. Still useful as I was tired of white peel off all over my skin and clothes. But definitely recommend for a bigger headphone.

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.
